summary: Complete M0 engagement dataset for deep root cause analysis

feb26_d0_d6_early_signal.note: Immature cohort - day-matched comparison for early warning

trial_quality_shift.diagnosis: PRIMARY DRIVER - Trial-to-payment flow broken, acquiring cold subscribers

platform_mix.insight: Web is tiny (<1%) - NOT a driver of drop

root_cause_summary.primary_80pct: Trial quality collapse - 27.7% acquiring without trial engagement
root_cause_summary.secondary_15pct: Dialect mix shift - Bhojpuri growing as % of base
root_cause_summary.tertiary_5pct: Channel mix - if cold acquisition growing vs re-engagement
root_cause_summary.ruled_out: Platform shift (web <1%), content issues (Nov peak proves quality achievable)
